# Creator Revenue Calculator

Creator Revenue Calculator provides 13 free, browser-based estimation tools for creators. Calculator inputs stay in the visitor's browser. Results are estimates, not guarantees or financial advice.

## Calculators

- YouTube ad revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/youtube-ad-revenue/
- TikTok revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/tiktok-revenue/
- Twitch revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/twitch-revenue/
- Instagram revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/instagram-revenue/
- Podcast revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/podcast-revenue/
- Affiliate revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/affiliate-calculator/
- Gaming YouTube revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/gaming-youtube-revenue/
- Finance YouTube revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/finance-youtube-revenue/
- Sponsorship rates: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/sponsorship-rate/
- UGC rates: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/ugc-rate/
- Engagement rate: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/engagement-rate/
- Newsletter revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/newsletter-revenue/
- Patreon revenue: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/patreon-revenue/

## Trust and limitations

- Methodology guide: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/guide/
- About: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/about.html
- Privacy: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/privacy.html
- Affiliate disclosure: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/affiliate-disclosure.html
- Calculations use public benchmarks and user-selected assumptions; actual earnings can vary materially.
- Google AdSense, Google Analytics, and Microsoft Clarity are not enabled.
- The former article archive is retired from public discovery pending individual editorial review.
